cobblemon.species.validys.name: Validys
cobblemon.species.validys.desc: It tightly grips the mirror that it constantly looked at during life, never letting go of its want to be prettier.
cobblemon.species.vaniterror.name: Vaniterror
cobblemon.species.vaniterror.desc: Vaniterror is tied to a large cracked vanity mirror. It drags people into its mirror as a sick twisted joke, seemingly only targeting people it deems beautiful.
cobblemon.species.basculin-festival.desc: These Basculin have forgone their original nature and instead choose to swim in the lakes and rivers around various gatherings and festivals. It is said that if they show up at a gathering, it will have great fortune.
cobblemon.species.basculegion-festival.d: After evolving, Festival Basculegion now leads the schools of its unevolved brethren to various parties and festivals, and will sometimes host its own for fellow Pokémon after learning from human festivals and culture.
cobblemon.species.drifloon-festival.desc: Festival Drifloon float around populated areas, attempting to get people's attention. The ones with prettier colors tend to thrive better.
cobblemon.species.drifblim-festival.desc: Upon evolution, Festival Drifblim has matured a little. It now uses its lantern-like body to guide lost souls back home on dangerous nights.
cobblemon.species.zorua-festival.desc: This special Hisuian Zorua has donned the mask of a demon for protection. It uses this mask to boost its spiritual energy and to protect itself.
cobblemon.species.zoroark-festival.desc: This Zoroark is full of even more hatred than its typical Hisuian counterpart. They use their brutal claws and masked stealth to pulverize their enemies.
cobblemon.species.sinisnow.name: Sinisnow
cobblemon.species.sinisnow.desc: Sinisnow is born from a Sinistea that lost its original cup attempting to find a new home. Now nestled in a shaved ice cup, Sinisnow spends its days lazing about, attempting to keep cool.
cobblemon.species.frostygeist.name: Frostygeist
cobblemon.species.frostygeist.desc: Frosygeist is the result of a Sinisnow's growth into a sticky and sweet syrup. It now has better control of the body it's contained in, and has grown rather arrogant of its new form. It tries to show off its colors to other Pokémon and attempts to command them with its spoon.
cobblemon.species.blacephalon-festival.d: This Blacephalon has become accustomed to life in our world. Rather than using its exploding head for harm, it uses it to entertain and uplift others.
cobblemon.species.hanyabi.name: Hanyabi
cobblemon.species.hanyabi.desc: Many consider this Pokémon to be a lucky companion to have around and as a guiding light to trainers who it trusts. But to those who it does not, Hanyabi is known for twisting their wishes and wills, turning potential boons into horrible curses.
cobblemon.species.grantump.name: Grantump
cobblemon.species.grantump.desc: Myths tell of an ancient Fairy-type Pokémon getting lost within the forest and hiding within a hollowed-out tree.
cobblemon.species.wystenent.name: Wystenent
cobblemon.species.wystenent.desc: This Pokémon is foretold to be incredibly old and wise. It's said to help trainers find their way, sometimes to places they did not know they were destined to reach.
cobblemon.species.flintlet.name: Flintlet
cobblemon.species.flintlet.desc: Flintlet are very territorial creatures, always locked in combat with others of their kind to sharpen their flint horns. Flintlet whose horns break are shunned by the clan.
cobblemon.species.cragahuitl.name: Cragahuitl
cobblemon.species.cragahuitl.desc: Cragahuitl forms once a Flintlet has bested many opponents in battle, amassing a treasure trove of flint broken off from its enemies. These shards form into a mighty frontal horn, accompanied by a stronger body to maintain the added weight.
cobblemon.species.kazoom.name: Kazoom
cobblemon.species.kazoom.desc: This Pokémon is said to have been born after a prototype for a hydrogen-powered engine suddenly came to life.
cobblemon.species.amphizoom.name: Amphizoom
cobblemon.species.amphizoom.desc: Recently, Amphizoom have been used to power driverless taxi vehicles. This phenomenon is likely based on the work of an inventor from another region.
cobblemon.species.vaniterror-mega.desc: The energy of Mega Evolution severs Vaniterror's mirror and shatters it. The now-unbound Vaniterror utilizes the shards of its former prison to mercilessly decimate its foes.
cobblemon.species.lilligant-mega.desc: Mega Evolution has caused Lilligant's body to bloom open by absorbing the power of the sun. However, the longer it stays in this form, the shorter its flower's lifespan will be.
